content.json:
## Windows Arc Benefits
Track which Arc capabilities are configured across your Windows servers. Each tab shows configured vs. unconfigured servers for a specific capability.

### Benefits Overview
Summary of all Windows Arc capabilities across your estate.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | extend extType = tostring(properties.type)
    | summarize extensions = make_set(extType) by parentId
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend hasAMA = iff(isnotempty(extensions) and extensions has 'AzureMonitorWindowsAgent', 1, 0)
| extend hasDefender = iff(isnotempty(extensions) and (extensions has 'MDE.Windows' or extensions has 'AzureSecurityWindowsAgent'), 1, 0)
| extend hasGuestConfig = iff(isnotempty(extensions) and (extensions has 'ConfigurationForWindows' or extensions has 'AzurePolicyforWindows'), 1, 0)
| extend hasWAC = iff(isnotempty(extensions) and extensions has 'AdminCenter', 1, 0)
| extend hasChangeTrack = iff(isnotempty(extensions) and extensions has 'ChangeTracking-Windows', 1, 0)
| extend hasKeyVault = iff(isnotempty(extensions) and extensions has 'KeyVaultForWindows', 1, 0)
| extend hasHybridWorker = iff(isnotempty(extensions) and extensions has 'HybridRunbookWorker', 1, 0)
| extend hasTagging = iff(array_length(bag_keys(tags)) > 0, 1, 0)
| extend hasUpdateMgr = iff(isnotnull(properties.osProfile.windowsConfiguration.patchSettings), 1, 0)
| extend isWS2025 = iff(tostring(properties.osSku) contains '2025', 1, 0)
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    ['Update Manager'] = sum(hasUpdateMgr),
    ['Defender for Cloud'] = sum(hasDefender),
    ['Monitoring (AMA)'] = sum(hasAMA),
    ['Guest Configuration'] = sum(hasGuestConfig),
    ['Windows Admin Center'] = sum(hasWAC),
    ['Change Tracking'] = sum(hasChangeTrack),
    ['Key Vault'] = sum(hasKeyVault),
    ['Hybrid Workers'] = sum(hasHybridWorker),
    ['Resource Tagging'] = sum(hasTagging),
    ['Hotpatching (WS2025)'] = sum(isWS2025)
content.title: Windows Arc Capabilities Summary

formatters.columnMatch: Update Manager|Defender for Cloud|Monitoring|Guest Configuration|Windows Admin Center|Resource Tagging|Hotpatching

content.json:
### Update Manager
Servers with patch assessment/management configured via Azure Update Manager.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend configured = isnotnull(properties.osProfile.windowsConfiguration.patchSettings)
| summarize count() by Status = iff(configured, 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
content.title: Update Manager Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend configured = isnotnull(properties.osProfile.windowsConfiguration.patchSettings)
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku, Status = tostring(properties.status), UpdateMgr = iff(configured, 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| order by UpdateMgr desc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details

content.json:
**What it provides:** Automated patch assessment and deployment scheduling for Windows servers.

**If not used:** Manual patching cycles, increased vulnerability window, labor-intensive compliance reporting.

**Labor cost formula:** Hours per server per month x hourly rate x 12 months

### Microsoft Defender for Cloud
Servers with Defender/MDE extension installed for threat detection.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('MDE.Windows', 'AzureSecurityWindowsAgent')
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasDefender = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasDefender), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Defender Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('MDE.Windows', 'AzureSecurityWindowsAgent')
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasDefender = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Defender = iff(isnotnull(hasDefender), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), Status = tostring(properties.status), Defender
| order by Defender desc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details

content.json:
**What it provides:** Real-time threat detection, vulnerability assessment, and security recommendations.

**If not used:** No automated threat detection, manual security scanning, delayed incident response.

**Labor cost formula:** Security analyst hours x hourly rate x 12 months

### Inventory & Tracking
All Arc-registered Windows servers are automatically inventoried.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend status = tostring(properties.status)
| summarize count() by status
content.title: Connection Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), Status = tostring(properties.status), agentVersion = tostring(properties.agentVersion), lastStatusChange = tostring(properties.lastStatusChange), location
| order by Name asc
content.title: Windows Server Inventory

content.json:
### Guest Configuration / Azure Policy
Servers with guest configuration agent for compliance auditing.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('ConfigurationForWindows', 'AzurePolicyforWindows')
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasGC = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasGC), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Guest Configuration Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('ConfigurationForWindows', 'AzurePolicyforWindows')
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasGC = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend GuestConfig = iff(isnotnull(hasGC), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), GuestConfig
| order by GuestConfig desc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details

content.json:
### Monitoring & Insights (AMA)
Servers with Azure Monitor Agent installed for log collection and monitoring.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'AzureMonitorWindowsAgent'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasAMA = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasAMA), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Azure Monitor Agent Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'AzureMonitorWindowsAgent'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasAMA = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend AMA = iff(isnotnull(hasAMA), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), AMA
| order by AMA desc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details

content.json:
### Resource Tagging
Servers with resource tags applied for cost tracking and organization.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend tagCount = array_length(bag_keys(tags))
| extend Status = iff(tagCount > 0, 'Tagged', 'Not Tagged')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Tagging Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend tagCount = array_length(bag_keys(tags))
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), TagCount = tagCount, Tags = tostring(tags)
| order by TagCount asc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details

content.json:
### Windows Admin Center
Servers with WAC extension for browser-based management.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'AdminCenter'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasWAC = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasWAC), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: WAC Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'AdminCenter'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasWAC = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend WAC = iff(isnotnull(hasWAC), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), Status = tostring(properties.status), WAC
| order by WAC desc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details

content.json:
### Hotpatching (Windows Server 2025)
Windows Server 2025 servers eligible for hotpatching — apply security updates without reboots.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| extend isWS2025 = osSku contains '2025'
| where isWS2025
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku, Status = tostring(properties.status), location
| order by Name asc
content.title: Windows Server 2025 Eligible for Hotpatching

content.json:
### Change Tracking & Inventory
Servers with Change Tracking extension for monitoring file, registry, and software changes.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'ChangeTracking-Windows'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasCT = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasCT), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Change Tracking Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'

| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'ChangeTracking-Windows'

    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasCT = true

| extend ChangeTracking = iff(isnotnull(hasCT), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), Status = tostring(properties.status), ChangeTracking

content.json:
### Azure Key Vault Extension
Servers with the Key Vault extension for automated certificate rotation and secret management.

resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'KeyVaultForWindows'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasKV = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasKV), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Key Vault Extension Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'

| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'

content.json:
### Azure Automation Hybrid Runbook Workers
Servers registered as Hybrid Runbook Workers for Azure Automation job execution.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'HybridRunbookWorker'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasHRW = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasHRW), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Hybrid Worker Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'HybridRunbookWorker'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasHRW = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend HybridWorker = iff(isnotnull(hasHRW), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), Status = tostring(properties.status), HybridWorker
| order by HybridWorker desc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details
